mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically expanding equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor demand and impending recession risk, triggering earnings downgrade cycles that compress equity multiples and drive negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns do not decline significantly when the unemployment trigger activates compared to non-triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising private sector credit availability combined with increasing housing starts jointly indicate robust aggregate demand and business investment, supporting corporate revenue growth and positive equity returns over the quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of historical observations where both series rise simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production in a disinflationary environment signals successful supply chain restoration and capacity expansion, lowering input costs and expanding profit margins to drive short-term equity outperformance.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to produce positive 5-day returns when CPIAUCSL remains above 3.5% year-over-year.

mechanism_narrative: Contractionary real GDP growth triggers a systemic earnings downgrade cycle across cyclical sectors, depressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns remain positive during consecutive quarters of GDP contraction.

mechanism_narrative: Steady monthly payroll growth sustains household disposable income and consumer spending power, driving consistent corporate cash flows and positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows no monotonic relationship with 20-day forward returns over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous high policy rates and accelerating headline inflation compress real yields and erode purchasing power, triggering risk-off equity repricing and negative forward returns over the quarter.
failure_condition: Equity returns do not decline when both series exceed their respective historical thresholds simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts collapsing below 1.0 million units signal immediate construction sector distress and broader demand weakness, causing short-term equity drawdowns as investors price in near-term economic slowdown.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns are not negative when HOUST drops below 1.0 million units.
